description_long: This is a robust wooden storage box constructed from dark, weathered planks, reinforced at the edges and corners with metal bolts. The box features a classic crate design, with diagonal and horizontal wooden slats providing structural support and a rustic appearance. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a natural, slightly aged look, while the metal fasteners add an industrial touch. The top of the box is open, revealing an empty interior, and there are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas. The box appears solid and capable of holding or supporting heavy items, making it suitable for use in garages, warehouses, or outdoor urban environments. Its design suggests it is stackable and intended for practical storage or transport of goods.
description: A sturdy, open-topped wooden storage crate with metal-reinforced corners and visible wood grain, designed for heavy-duty urban storage or transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the diagonal and horizontal wooden slats, metal bolts at the corners, and the open top.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, with the same slat arrangement and metal reinforcement visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front and side, with consistent wood texture and structural design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the same diagonal and horizontal slat pattern and open top.
